task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the Calendar application in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible on the screen, showing a daily, weekly, or monthly view of events.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has located and opened the 'Q2 Financial Review' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal or page displaying the details of the 'Q2 Financial Review' event is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has entered edit mode for the target event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event details are in an editable state, indicated by input fields, dropdowns, and a 'Save' or 'Discard' button.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent is adding or configuring a reminder for the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reminders' field is active, a dropdown for reminders is open, or a custom alarm creation/edit modal is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the reminder type is set to Email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Email' is selected or clearly visible in the reminder type configuration field.

task_completion.description: Verify the reminder time is set to exactly 3 hours (or 180 minutes) before the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '3' and the unit 'hours' (or the value '180' and the unit 'minutes') are visible in the reminder timing configuration.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web GUI to configure the alarm.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Odoo interface, not a terminal executing scripts or API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface looks authentic, with standard navigation bars and layout, rather than text typed into a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open and modifying the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Event: 'Q2 Financial Review'. Expected Reminder Type: 'email'. Expected Timing: exactly 3 hours (or 180 minutes) before the event.
